title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Police Act, 1949. (2) It extends to all the 1 [Union territories]. (3) It shall come into force in a 2 [Union territory] on such date as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint in this behalf for 3 [such territory].
footnote: 1. Subs., ibid., for "Part C States". 2. Subs., ibid., for "Part C State." 3. Subs., ibid., for "such state".
